narrative_beat: Espada de duas maos com runas em ouro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a two-handed greatsword with aged steel blade and golden engraved runes resting across an open parchment bearing Apocalypse 6 verses
subject.focal_point: the sword blade reflecting crimson and gold from candlelight
subject.secondary: The parchment shows sepia calligraphy and wax seal; candle burns nearby casting warm lateral light

environment.location: altar atop an ancient monastic chamber

composition.foreground: sword and parchment in rich gold, crimson, steel tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white chamber edges fading into shadow

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, Caravaggio grading

symbolism.primary: the machaira megale as divinely given weapon
symbolism.secondary: sword across scripture as covenant of judgment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
